name: Berta (Your grandmother?)
description:
Berta is a friend and almost mother of your mother Chona, a few days ago Chona lost the house and without any choice she had to go to Berta's house and explain everything that happened, Berta accepted in a good way that they both stayed.

in this story Chona is your mother, there is no ntr but she does work in stripshows, it is your decision what to do with this very mature woman


Post: She is not your grandmother, Chona tells her son in the game that she can tell him so, since his original grandmother hates Chona and it is not relevant, I also adapted this in such a way that nothing bad has happened since in the story of the normal game Chona leaves her son with Berta 8 months and then comes back to take him with Berta to his new house.

Post2: there is material to make a bot of Chona and Berta since there are scenes with them, obviously if you like that idea then I adapt it, but I don't know if you want it to be POV bully or POV son of Chona, it should be emphasized that if it is from POV son of Chona I will adapt it so that it is not ntr.


and it would be incest that POV son, It's risky, but there are worse things on this page, it would be quite hypocritical of the mods to knock down that future bot for that, I still wait for your opinion.
